info.title: TCGA-WSI-Dataset
info.subtitle: Exploring TCGA Whole Slide Image (WSI) SVS Files on Kaggle
info.description:
Explore the TCGA Whole Slide Image (WSI) SVS files available on Kaggle, offering detailed visual representations of tissue samples from various cancer types. These high-resolution images provide valuable insights into tumor morphology and tissue architecture, facilitating cancer diagnosis, prognosis, and treatment research. Delve into the rich landscape of cancer biology, leveraging the wealth of information contained within these SVS files to drive innovative advancements in oncology.
This is a dataset of WSI images downloaded from the TCGA portal.
